columns.extraction_plan: From Figure A1 (A) (High Volume): Darolutamide, North America: 95 patients. From Figure A1 (B) (Low Volume): Darolutamide, North America: 30 patients. Total Darolutamide, North America = 95 + 30 = 125 patients. Total Darolutamide patients (overall) = 651 (from Figure 1 on page 3 and Table 2 on page 8). Percentage = (125 / 651) * 100% = 19.20%. Value: 125 (19.20%)

From Figure A1 (A) (High Volume): Placebo, North America: 88 patients. From Figure A1 (B) (Low Volume): Placebo, North America: 31 patients. Total Placebo, North America = 88 + 31 = 119 patients. Total Placebo patients (overall) = 654 (from Figure 1 on page 3 and Table 2 on page 8). Percentage = (119 / 654) * 100% = 18.19%. Value: 119 (18.19%)

From Figure A1 (A) (High Volume): Darolutamide, Asia Pacific: 175 patients. From Figure A1 (B) (Low Volume): Darolutamide, Asia Pacific: 54 patients. Total Darolutamide, Asia Pacific = 175 + 54 = 229 patients. Total Darolutamide patients (overall) = 651 (from Figure 1 on page 3 and Table 2 on page 8). Percentage = (229 / 651) * 100% = 35.18%. Value: 229 (35.18%)
